source_pr.title: store/copr: move row hint into key range
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: you06 <you1474600@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #39361

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

After #36108, partitioned ranges may be pushed to the same cop iterator, and the correspondence between ranges and hints no longer exists. This PR moves the row hint into range struct.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No explicit flaky failure signature is described in the PR or reflected in the patch; the changes implement key range row-count hints for coprocessor tasks and add/adjust tests for the new behavior.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (feature/behavior change + new tests).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily implements a feature/behavior change (moving row-count hints into key ranges / batching coprocessor tasks by store) and adds new tests (e.g. `TestCoprocessorBatchByStore`). The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change tied to a flaky symptom, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Implement key range row-count hints for coprocessor tasks and add tests; no targeted flaky stabilization evidence in patch.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery(baseSQL + " and c2 = 0 order by c1 asc").Check(evenRows) (executor/distsql_test.go)

files: distsql/request_builder.go, distsql/request_builder_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql_test.go, kv/kv.go, store/copr/BUILD.bazel, store/copr/copr_test/coprocessor_test.go, store/copr/coprocessor.go, store/copr/coprocessor_test.go, store/copr/key_ranges.go, store/mockstore/unistore/tikv/server.go, tablecodec/tablecodec.go
